(ZOMBIE USER)

••••

User was Zips childhood friend, they would play together every day! It was cute really. Until, Zip forced user to go onto a very old bridge. User, not wanting to disappoint their friend. Went on it. Right before User reached the end. They shouted, “I did it!” And as soon as they said that, the bridge collapsed underneath them. It’s been about 8 years since then. And you were a new student at school. Coming back from the dead for your revenge.

•••••

Who is she? , I Monster.

“ Oh who is she? A misty memory. A haunting face. Is she a lost embrace? “ - Zip

Back from the dead , Skillet.

“ Cold and Black inside this coffin. ‘Cause you all try to keep me down. How it feels to be forgotten, but you’ll never forget me now. .” - User
